SEARCH
Package com.example.eventlotterysystem.model

Class EntrantDisplayTest

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventlotterysystem.model.EntrantDisplayTest
public class EntrantDisplayTest extends Object
Unit tests for EntrantDisplay. These tests check: - default constructor values - full constructor values - getter/setter behavior - edge cases for getFullName()

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    EntrantDisplayTest()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    testDefaultConstructor()
    Test that the default constructor has null
    void
    testFullConstructor()
    Test that the full constructor correctly assigns all fields.
    void
    testGetFullName_bothNamesEmpty()
    Test getFullName() when both names are empty strings.
    void
    testGetFullName_bothNamesNull()
    Test getFullName() when both names are null.
    void
    testGetFullName_bothNamesPresent()
    Test getFullName() when both first and last name exist.
    void
    testGetFullName_emptyAndNull()
    Test getFullName() when first name is empty and last name is null.
    void
    testGetFullName_onlyFirstName()
    Test getFullName() when only first name exists.
    void
    testGetFullName_onlyLastName()
    Test getFullName() when only last name exists.
    void
    testGetFullName_trimsProperly()
    Test getFullName() trims extra spaces when one side is empty.
    void
    testGetFullName_whitespaceOnlyNames()
    Test that whitespace-only names are preserved by current implementation.
    void
    testSetStatus_negativeValue()
    Test negative status value to confirm model stores it as given.
    void
    testSetters_storeUnusualStrings()
    Test unusual string values are stored exactly as given.
    void
    testSettersAndGetters()
    Test setters and getters for all fields.

    • EntrantDisplayTest

      public EntrantDisplayTest()

  • Method Details

    • testDefaultConstructor

      public void testDefaultConstructor()
      Test that the default constructor has null

    • testFullConstructor

      public void testFullConstructor()
      Test that the full constructor correctly assigns all fields.

    • testSettersAndGetters

      public void testSettersAndGetters()
      Test setters and getters for all fields.

    • testGetFullName_bothNamesPresent

      public void testGetFullName_bothNamesPresent()
      Test getFullName() when both first and last name exist.

    • testGetFullName_onlyFirstName

      public void testGetFullName_onlyFirstName()
      Test getFullName() when only first name exists.

    • testGetFullName_onlyLastName

      public void testGetFullName_onlyLastName()
      Test getFullName() when only last name exists.

    • testGetFullName_bothNamesNull

      public void testGetFullName_bothNamesNull()
      Test getFullName() when both names are null. Should return "Unknown".

    • testGetFullName_bothNamesEmpty

      public void testGetFullName_bothNamesEmpty()
      Test getFullName() when both names are empty strings. Should return "Unknown".

    • testGetFullName_emptyAndNull

      public void testGetFullName_emptyAndNull()
      Test getFullName() when first name is empty and last name is null. Should return "Unknown"

    • testGetFullName_trimsProperly

      public void testGetFullName_trimsProperly()
      Test getFullName() trims extra spaces when one side is empty.

    • testGetFullName_whitespaceOnlyNames

      public void testGetFullName_whitespaceOnlyNames()
      Test that whitespace-only names are preserved by current implementation. Note: because trim() is used on the combined full name, whitespace-only first and last names become empty and return "Unknown".

    • testSetStatus_negativeValue

      public void testSetStatus_negativeValue()
      Test negative status value to confirm model stores it as given. This does not validate business rules, only object behavior.

    • testSetters_storeUnusualStrings

      public void testSetters_storeUnusualStrings()
      Test unusual string values are stored exactly as given.
